text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son dien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deur Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; diß gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRICE>L. 27</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4°.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. à <PRICE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":14,"explanation":"The following corrections were made:
1. Unicode escape '√§' (corrupted 'ä') in 'Buchläden' restored to proper 'ä'.
2. Unicode escape '√º' (corrupted 'ü') in 'Bücher' restored to proper 'ü'.
3. Unicode escape '√ábscriptiones' (corrupted 'S') in 'Subscriptiones' restored.
4. Unicode escape '√©' (corrupted 'é') in 'appellé' restored to proper 'é'.
5. All '&' characters in titles properly escaped as '&' for valid XML (multiple instances across titles).
6. Inconsistent tag 'PRIZE' replaced with the correct 'PRICE' tag throughout (4 instances: fl. 24, L. 27, fl. 18, fl. 5. 24. xr.) to match the correctly used 'PRICE' tag in the Corpus Juris entry.
7. Mismatched closing tag '</PRICE>' on the last BIBL entry (which opened with '<PRIZE>') corrected to '</PRICE>' after normalising the opening tag to '<PRICE>'.
8. Unicode escape '√º' (corrupted 'ß') in 'diß' restored to proper 'ß'.
9. Unicode escape '√†' (corrupted price indicator 'à') restored to 'à' in three price entries.
10. Unicode escape '√≤' (corrupted degree symbol '°') in '4°.' restored to proper '°'.
11. Stray '-' after the closing '</TITLE>' tag in the Bayle entry removed (typographic artefact, not a valid XML construct).
12. Misplaced '.' before '<FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT>' moved to after the closing '</AUTHOR>' tag for correct sentence structure."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son dien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deur Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; diß gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRICE>L. 27</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4°.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. à <PRICE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
The following corrections were made:
1. Unicode escape '√§' (corrupted 'ä') in 'Buchläden' restored to proper 'ä'.
2. Unicode escape '√º' (corrupted 'ü') in 'Bücher' restored to proper 'ü'.
3. Unicode escape '√ábscriptiones' (corrupted 'S') in 'Subscriptiones' restored.
4. Unicode escape '√©' (corrupted 'é') in 'appellé' restored to proper 'é'.
5. All '&' characters in titles properly escaped as '&' for valid XML (multiple instances across titles).
6. Inconsistent tag 'PRIZE' replaced with the correct 'PRICE' tag throughout (4 instances: fl. 24, L. 27, fl. 18, fl. 5. 24. xr.) to match the correctly used 'PRICE' tag in the Corpus Juris entry.
7. Mismatched closing tag '</PRICE>' on the last BIBL entry (which opened with '<PRIZE>') corrected to '</PRICE>' after normalising the opening tag to '<PRICE>'.
8. Unicode escape '√º' (corrupted 'ß') in 'diß' restored to proper 'ß'.
9. Unicode escape '√†' (corrupted price indicator 'à') restored to 'à' in three price entries.
10. Unicode escape '√≤' (corrupted degree symbol '°') in '4°.' restored to proper '°'.
11. Stray '-' after the closing '</TITLE>' tag in the Bayle entry removed (typographic artefact, not a valid XML construct).
12. Misplaced '.' before '<FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT>' moved to after the closing '</AUTHOR>' tag for correct sentence structure.
